revision.comment: Immanuelle moved page [[Kokubunjihekireki Shrine]] to [[Kokubun-ji Hekireki Shrine]]: Text replacement - "Kokubunjihekireki Shrine" to "Kokubun-ji Hekireki Shrine"
Bot: Create shrine page for Kokubunjihekireki Shrine
adding dummy category to make categories work

revision.text:
<!--generated by generate_shikinaisha_pages_v25_with_redirects.py-->
{{Infobox religious building
| name = Kokubunjihekireki Shrine
| mapframe = yes
| mapframe-zoom = 15
| mapframe-wikidata = yes
| mapframe-point = none
| map_type = Japan
| map_caption = Kokubunjihekireki Shrine
| coordinates = {{coord|34.943352|132.121133}}
| map_relief = 1
| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]
}}

'''Kokubunjihekireki Shrine''' is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]].

== instance of (P31) ==

* {{ill|Shikinai Ronsha|lt=Shikinai Ronsha|ja|論社|WD=Q135022904}}

== coordinate location (P625) ==

* {{coord|34.943352|132.121133}}

== said to be the same as (P460) ==

* {{ill|Kokubunjihiyakurakuno Shrine|lt=Kokubunjihiyakurakuno Shrine|WD=Q135041124}}

[[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages]]
[[Category:Shikinai Ronsha]]

{{wikidata link|Q137190463}}
